results.title: Shell's AI predictive maintenance program saves $400 million annually as biorefineries pursue carbon neutrality
results.description: Shell's predictive maintenance AI saves $400M annually and cuts unplanned downtime 45%. ENEOS and Yokogawa deployments reduced CO2 emissions 40%, while biodiesel production rates reached 84-98% with AI-driven modeling.

results.title: Divorced Idol To Get Married Again—Fiancé Revealed
results.description: Later this year, Jewelry member Seo In Young will be tying the knot with Choi Ji Hoon, CEO of the content creative company NP.
